disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intense, generalised, whole-body itch that is not a rash and has completely failed high-dose oral antihistamines and topical anti-itch creams
trigger_question_examples: Where is the itching and what does it feel like?
Have you tried anything for it, and did it help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's everywhere, my whole body, and it's not really a rash — just relentless itching. I've taken strong antihistamines and used anti-itch creams and they've done absolutely nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Itch is markedly worse at night and severe enough to cause days of sleep deprivation and functional collapse
trigger_question_examples: Is it worse at any particular time?
How is it affecting your sleep and daily life?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's worst at night when I'm trying to sleep — I haven't slept properly in days and I'm completely wiped out and can barely function.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound, disproportionate fatigue and daytime somnolence present for months, preceding the itch crisis
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any other symptoms over the last few months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been exhausted for months, way more tired than I can explain, and sleepy during the day even before the itching got this bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dry eyes and dry mouth (sicca symptoms)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any dryness of your eyes or mouth?
Do your eyes feel gritty or does your mouth feel unusually dry?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my eyes and mouth have been really dry.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New non-sun-related darkening of the skin (hyperpigmentation)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your skin colour?
Has your skin looked darker or different anywhere recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My skin does look a bit darker than usual and I haven't been out in the sun.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Soft yellowish deposits around the eyelids (patient-observed xanthelasma-type lesions)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any lumps or yellowish patches on your skin or eyelids?
Any new marks, bumps or deposits around your eyes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are some small soft yellowish patches on my eyelids that I noticed recently.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild right-upper-quadrant discomfort, without colicky pain
trigger_question_examples: Any pain or discomfort in your tummy, especially the upper right side?
Do you get any ache under your ribs on the right?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a mild ache under my ribs on the right side, but it's not sharp or severe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of jaundice — patient reports the whites of the eyes are not yellow (pertinent negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you or anyone noticed any yellowing of your eyes or skin?
Do the whites of your eyes look at all yellow?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, the whites of my eyes still look normal to me, not yellow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, rigors or severe/sudden abdominal pain (pertinent negatives that lower the probability of an acute biliary emergency)
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, shakes/shivering, or sudden severe tummy pain?
Have you had any high temperatures, rigors, or sudden severe abdominal pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shivering, and no sudden severe pain — just the mild ache and the itching.
